creator: pi@opsec.eu
text:
Hi!

> Synopsis: [ports] [update] new version
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: sylvio
> State-Changed-When: Fri Jul 2 20:59:50 UTC 2010
> State-Changed-Why: 
> - Error in plist: http://people.freebsd.org/~sylvio/cego-2.6.2.log
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=148298

Patch of plist which upgrades to cego-2.6.3.

---------------

diff -r -u /usr/ports/databases/cego/Makefile databases/cego/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/databases/cego/Makefile	2010-07-01 07:49:29.000000000 +0200
+++ databases/cego/Makefile	2010-07-04 13:35:13.000000000 +0200
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD: ports/databases/cego/Makefile,v 1.1 2010/07/01 05:49:29 miwi Exp $
 
 PORTNAME=	cego
-PORTVERSION=	2.5.13
+PORTVERSION=	2.6.3
 CATEGORIES=	databases
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.lemke-it.com/
 DISTNAME=	cego-${PORTVERSION}
diff -r -u /usr/ports/databases/cego/distinfo databases/cego/distinfo
--- /usr/ports/databases/cego/distinfo	2010-07-01 07:49:29.000000000 +0200
+++ databases/cego/distinfo	2010-07-04 13:35:24.000000000 +0200
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (cego-2.5.13.tar.gz) = 163d35defe03fbffa46b215bbd4348be
-SHA256 (cego-2.5.13.tar.gz) = 93a0ef10d6790874b1087c78fcf0098d933e010b8f280e7f9a7feb7dae5fae9c
-SIZE (cego-2.5.13.tar.gz) = 634213
+MD5 (cego-2.6.3.tar.gz) = 3928719b70c4d7fed9e8f80258ac80a4
+SHA256 (cego-2.6.3.tar.gz) = 3c834e15f269db73cb2994a05a6effae37a1a6ea54edaf9e2bc442043a2eeca0
+SIZE (cego-2.6.3.tar.gz) = 635275
diff -r -u /usr/ports/databases/cego/pkg-plist databases/cego/pkg-plist
--- /usr/ports/databases/cego/pkg-plist	2010-07-01 07:49:29.000000000 +0200
+++ databases/cego/pkg-plist	2010-07-04 13:59:00.000000000 +0200
@@ -26,8 +26,8 @@
 lib/libcego.so.1
 lib/libcgwrap.a
 lib/libcgwrap.so.1
-share/licenses/cego-2.5.13/GPLv2
-share/licenses/cego-2.5.13/LICENSE
-share/licenses/cego-2.5.13/catalog.mk
-@dirrm share/licenses/cego-2.5.13
+share/licenses/cego-2.6.3/GPLv2
+share/licenses/cego-2.6.3/LICENSE
+share/licenses/cego-2.6.3/catalog.mk
+@dirrm share/licenses/cego-2.6.3
 @dirrm share/licenses

-- 
pi@opsec.eu            +49 171 3101372                        10 years to go !
